programme.title: Time Concert: Old Friends - EP 8
programme.desc: This music variety centres on the theme "Friends", the program invites members of the "Time Concert" family to gather in the "House of Time". The singers use music to connect emotional stories and awaken the common memories of the times.

programme.title: The Second Husband - EP 88
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Feng Shanhua overcomes various hardships even after being wrongly accused. This is a story of fate, love, secrets and forgiveness that stem from her relationship with her two families, one of her birth mother and the other of the mother who raised her.

programme.title: Past Life, Present Love - EP 14
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Thai) Wei Lun sets up a trap to arrest Miss Guo, the social media influencer who is helping Li Sha taste test the new diet supplement. Pu Da Ren is livid after finding out that the police confiscated all the new diet supplement from Song Le Li Clinic.

programme.title: The Real Has Come! - EP 75
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Unable to find Tianlan and Junhe, the Kong family is on the verge of calling the police, but Aika begs them to give Junhe a little more time. Shizhen eventually learns that Junhe is at a temple, yet when they rush there, he is already gone.

programme.title: The Real Has Come! - EP 76
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Shuijing cares for Hongjun but hesitates to fund his treatment because his mother is Xianyu Xi. Desperate, Xianyu Xi begs Shuijing to save Hongjun, even offering to give up her role as his mother.

programme.title: No Ordinary Rescue S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: Over 3,000 children went missing without a trace, at the turn of the millennium in Shenzhen. Desperate parents use social media to reach out to others who may have seen their missing children.

programme.title: Hotel Del Luna - EP 11
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Youna encounters another Magu sister, a stern woman in black, who intends to destroy her for inhabiting someone else's body.

programme.title: News Tonight - EP 15
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: CINTA JUMBO MAS BAKSO
programme.desc: Hendra is a wealthy heir who defies his father by choosing to sell meatballs (bakso) instead of running the family empire. While preparing for a major festival, he is hit by a motorcycle carrying Ratna (Michelle Ziudith), a curvy girl with a huge appetite for meatballs. To Hendra’s fury, Ratna’s boyfriend whisks her away without apologizing. However, fate brings them together again when they cross paths at the very festival Hendra is competing in.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 154
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: How To Make King of Strawberry Sebelum Hari H
programme.desc: Refusing to marry the man her father chose, Sila (Shanice Margaretha) runs away and crosses paths with Rafan (Hardi Fadhillah). It’s love at first sight for her, but her father isn't giving up so easily. He has already prepared a scheme that is guaranteed to get under Rafan's skin and test their budding romance.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 608
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 102
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Sampahnya Dipungut Perasaanku Keangkut
programme.desc: Hana (Shanice Margaretha) works hard as a garbage collector, driving a three-wheeled motor cart every day. Her life changes when she bravely saves a young girl named Chika (Firzanah Alya) from a kidnapping attempt. Grateful for her bravery, Chika’s wealthy father, Adit (Fendy Chow), immediately hires Hana to be his daughter's full-time nanny.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 154
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Mba Chicken Wings Senyumnya Sederhana Tapi Bikin Warga Marah
programme.desc: Desperate to escape an arranged marriage with Kelvin, Dinda (Jennifer Eve) runs away from home. While being chased by her father’s men, she spots an open car and hides inside. Little does she know, the car belongs to Baim (El Ryan Carlen), who happens to be Kelvin's best friend. Now, Dinda must navigate her feelings while staying hidden from those searching for her.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 608
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: Kita Yang Kampung Tapi Semesta Mendukung
programme.desc: Jali (Kenny Austin) is a handsome young man with a secret: he hasn't been circumcised. Worried about his son’s future, his father, Babe Hai, comes up with a desperate plan to tie Jali to his bed and calls for a doctor. Enter Nadia (Jennifer Eve), a beautiful young doctor new to the village health clinic. Her presence causes a sensation, and she quickly goes viral, leading to a crowd of local men suddenly faking illnesses just to get a check-up from her.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 103
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: CINTA GUE ANTI UTANG
programme.desc: Tommy (Hardi Fadhillah) hates his job: collecting debts for his father. His latest assignment is Bu Anisa, who hasn't paid her twenty-five million rupiah debt in five years. Tommy is ready to be firm until he meets Ratih (Naomi Zaskia), Bu Anisa's daughter. Ratih touches Tommy’s heart when she promises to pay off the debt using her meager salary as a village school teacher.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 155
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Manusia Silver Gantengnya Bikin Baper
programme.desc: Dewa (Lavicky Nicholas) moves to the big city with one goal: to get rich and marry his girlfriend back home. But his urban adventure takes a weird turn when he meets Dewi (Larasati Nugroho), a woman who makes a living through a very peculiar and unexpected profession.

programme.title: CINTA JUMBO MAS BAKSO
programme.desc: Hendra is a wealthy heir who defies his father by choosing to sell meatballs (bakso) instead of running the family empire. While preparing for a major festival, he is hit by a motorcycle carrying Ratna (Michelle Ziudith), a curvy girl with a huge appetite for meatballs. To Hendra’s fury, Ratna’s boyfriend whisks her away without apologizing. However, fate brings them together again when they cross paths at the very festival Hendra is competing in.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 155
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: How To Make King of Strawberry Sebelum Hari H
programme.desc: Refusing to marry the man her father chose, Sila (Shanice Margaretha) runs away and crosses paths with Rafan (Hardi Fadhillah). It’s love at first sight for her, but her father isn't giving up so easily. He has already prepared a scheme that is guaranteed to get under Rafan's skin and test their budding romance.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 104
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: SI MANIS PENJAGA HATI YANG TAK INGKAR JANJI
programme.desc: After losing her security job and having her motorcycle taken by Leo (Junior Liem), Aya (Yunita Siregar) chases him down, thinking he’s a thief. Leo is a spoiled rich man who hates being followed by guards. When his frustrated bodyguards quit, Leo's father, Mr. Herman, desperately looks for a replacement. Despite his initial doubts, Mr. Herman hires Aya after seeing her impressive pencak silat skills making her the new protector for the man she tried to punch.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 156
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Mau Bikin Romantis Ternyata Bikin Nangis
programme.desc: Deva (Ika Diharjo) balances two lives: she’s a pencak silat instructor and a cleaning service worker at Rizki’s (Mahdy Reza) college. Rizki, who is nursing a broken heart after being cheated on, desperately needs a distraction. He asks Deva to pose as his new girlfriend to impress his mother, leading to a fake relationship filled with kicks and complications.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 610
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

Despite his initial doubts, Mr. Herman hires Aya after seeing her impressive pencak silat skills making her the new protector for the man she tried to punch.

programme.title: Naluri Hati - EP 4
programme.desc: Pada hari perkahwinannya, Dinda teragak-agak kerana dia akan berkahwin dengan orang yang tidak dicintainya. Namun, satu kejadian berlaku dan menyebabkan Dinda mengalami amnesia separa.

programme.title: Kail Pagi Makan Petang - EP 9
programme.desc: Program mengisahkan tentang teknik memancing dan ikuti pengembaran mereka untuk mengetahui ikan yang ditangkap dan masakan menarik yang akan disediakan.

programme.title: Potong - EP 11
programme.desc: Kisah mengenai seorang pemuda Midun, yang kini menyambung legasi perkhidmatan berkhatan tradisional peninggalan arwah bapanya, seorang Tok Mudim handal di kampung.

programme.title: Bas Ria - EP 21
programme.desc: Bas Ria bakal menyaksikan pasukan Bas Ria "memburu" selebriti-selebriti di dalam "hit list" mereka? Untuk apa? Untuk mendapatkan sesuatu yang berharga dari mereka.

programme.title: JOZAN - EP 1
programme.desc: Duo pelawak paling popular kini kembali setelah 7 tahun tidak bersama menghiburkan peminat menerusi program bual bicara terbaru yang pasti menghiburkan anda.

programme.title: Aku Dan Tok Wan - EP 6
programme.desc: Tok Wan di hantar untuk duduk bersama cucunya, Amir kerana Tok Wan menghidapi kencing manis dan di arahkan tinggal bersama ahli keluarga untuk mendapat jagaan rapi

programme.title: Opah Popular - EP 9
programme.desc: Badrul dan Sofia bertugas di luar negara dan menghabiskan cuti dengan balik ke kampung. Anaknya mereka dipaksa untuk tinggal bersama opah.

programme.title: Mission Majnu
programme.desc: Amid the Indo-Pakistani War of 1971, a RAW agent enters Pakistan to prove the country's complicity in nuclear weapons. To succeed, he must alert his nation and avoid an attack on the wrong location. Release Year: 2023 Director: Shantanu Bagchi Awards: 2023 Winner Technical Award Web- Best Screenplay - OTT- Aseem ArroraParveez SheikhSumit - Batheja,2023 Nominee Popular Award- Most Popular Actor in a Digital Film- Sidharth Malhotra

programme.title: Race
programme.desc: A tale of greed, betrayal and revenge as two brothers are pitted against each other! High stakes! Perfect murder! Release Year: 2008 Director: Abbas Burmawalla,Mustan Burmawalla

programme.title: Army
programme.desc: Army officer Arjun marries Geeta but is killed by gangster Naagraj. Geeta, pregnant and fueled by revenge, teams up with escaped convicts to fight Naagraj. Release Year: 1996 Director: Raam Shetty

programme.title: Foot Fairy
programme.desc: When a serial killer with a foot fetish goes on the loose in Mumbai targetting young women, CBI officer Vivan Deshmukh is tasked with finding the murderer. Will he succeed? Release Year: 2020 Director: Kanishk Varma

programme.title: Tigers : Can A Salesman Be A Hero
programme.desc: Ayan, a pharmaceutical salesman, decides to stand against his company after discovering that their new baby formula is responsible for the death of many babies. Release Year: 2014 Director: Danis Tanovic Awards: 2014 Nominee Golden Seashell- Best Film- Danis Tanovic

programme.title: A Flying Jatt
programme.desc: Aman a meek youngster who is scared of heights, discovers his superpowers when he is forced to face the evil Raka, who is sent by an industrialist to destroy humanity. Release Year: 2016 Director: Remo D'Souza Awards: 2017 Nominee Reader's Choice- Best Choreographer- Rahul ShettyPaul Cardoz

programme.title: Gadar-Ek Prem Katha
programme.desc: During the partition, Tara and Sakina's joyful marriage is torn apart when her father forces her to remain in Pakistan, separating her from Tara and their family. Release Year: 2001 Director: Anil Sharma

programme.title: Singh Saab The Great
programme.desc: Singh Saab is a responsible tax collector who believes in honesty, but Bhoodev, a conniving man, plots against him. Singh adopts a unique way to teach Bhoodev a lesson. Release Year: 2013 Director: Anil Sharma

programme.title: Simmba
programme.desc: A corrupt police officer, works for Durva, an influential smuggler. However, his life takes an unusual turn when he decides to avenge a woman who was assaulted by Durva's brothers. Release Year: 2018 Director: Rohit Shetty Awards: 2019 Winner Bollywood BusineSS Award- Highest-GroSSing Actor- Ranveer Singh

programme.title: Coolie (1983)
programme.desc: An honest worker rises against injustice when powerful enemies exploit the poor. With courage and determination, he leads a fiery fight for dignity, justice and survival. Release Year: 1983 Director: Manmohan Desai, Prayag Raj

programme.desc: Several Komians are busy around a large cauldron closely supervised by the High Priestess. Pokou manages to escape with the young boy who had set the trap for the Komian, before saving her.

programme.desc: While he is taking his wife to hospital to give birth, Thomas hits and kills a young man on the road. The young man's mother Marie-France, is devastated. Nine years later, without revealing her identity, she becomes Thomas' secretary and gets more and more involved in his life.

programme.title: Foreigners
programme.desc: Jim, 15, is deeply shaken by the arrival of Neil, his British father whom he hasn't seen in five years. The teenager is about to be adopted by his stepfather, with whom he has formed a true bond. But Neil refuses to give up his parental rights...

programme.title: Ma Gueule
programme.desc: 2016, during the European Cup. Stephane returns to La Louviere, his home town, to watch a match with his childhood friends, Luca and Cesare. When Italy wins, they head off to celebrate the victory in a Flemish night club. But there's a problem: Stephane is refused entry.

programme.title: Alex Hugo - EP 23
programme.desc: In a rusty car just outside Lusagne, Alex finds the prostate but alive body of a young man who'd gone missing years earlier. An emotional return for friends and family. But, very quickly, Alex finds the story the young man gives of his kidnap-ping and years of absence somewhat unlikely.

programme.title: Tendance XXI
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: Meurtres A Mont-De-Marsan
programme.desc: The body of a man is found submerged in a spring reputed to be miraculous. Everything suggests an esoteric ritual. Soline Plassin, a gendarmerie commander, teams up with a new deputy, Adam Tudoret. The investigators quickly come to suspect Aurore, Soline's sister, recently released from prison.

programme.title: Rassemblance - EP 17
programme.desc: At 17, fleeing the Taliban, Rohullah Hossiny travels through Iran, Turkey, and Greece before arriving in Belgium. In Brussels, thanks to the Duo for a job association, he finds a mentor and joins Corica, where he becomes a master roaster. In turn, he trains other exiles.

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: 64' Debat
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: L'invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Le Point
programme.desc: Magazine programme which explores issues relating to society, science and the environment, involving investigations and in-depth analysis, from a resolutely Canadian perspective.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rtbf
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: Version Francaise - EP 3
programme.desc: Visit to the three museums at the Polish Library in Paris. Shapes navigate between imaginary worlds in ceramic artist Clementine de Chabaneix's universe. Willy Chavarria, American-Mexican designer and activist, shows at the American Cathedral in Paris. Bookbinders and gilders, Nathalie and Christophe Legrand restore books which they cover in light.

programme.title: Chroniques D'en Haut - EP 1
programme.desc: Originally from the Drome, in the small village of Chatillon-en-Diois, the professional mountaineer Benjamin Vedrines knows the ecrins massif well. Among other feats, he climbed the Dibona Needle in one hour and twenty-four minutes, a record-breaking performance achieved alone and without protection.

programme.title: Le Journal Afrique
programme.desc: All the African news from the TV5MONDE news staff.

programme.title: L'actu
programme.desc: The televised news programme from TVMonaco.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rts
programme.desc: All the news from RTS.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (8 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: L'invite

programme.title: C Dans L'air
programme.desc: All the latest major events, presented, explained and analysed! Special guests and journalists in the studio analyse both the latest news but also other controversial issues to give us a better understanding of the social, political and cultural events occurring around us.

programme.title: C'est Du Belge
programme.desc: In the company of Gerald Watelet, focus on the best ambassadors of Belgian culture and heritage, on the behind-the-scenes of unmissable events and portraits of personalities making the news.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil - EP 1793
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Magazine
programme.desc: TV5MONDE, the global French language network, offers the best television programmes from France, Belgium, Switzerland and Canada.

programme.title: Outremer.Gourmand - EP 23
programme.desc: To celebrate the cuisine of the French overseas departments and territories, make a date with each episode featuring a personality from the world of gastronomy. On the menu: discoveries, sharing, and an explosion of flavours!

programme.title: Version Francaise - EP 3
programme.desc: Visit to the three museums at the Polish Library in Paris. Shapes navigate between imaginary worlds in ceramic artist Clementine de Chabaneix's universe. Willy Chavarria, American-Mexican designer and activist, shows at the American Cathedral in Paris. Bookbinders and gilders, Nathalie and Christophe Legrand restore books which they cover in light.

programme.title: 6h Info
programme.desc: The 6am news bulletin (Paris time) by the France Televisions editorial team.

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: The latest news and laughter, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: The latest news and laughter, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Outremer.Gourmand - EP 23
programme.desc: To celebrate the cuisine of the French overseas departments and territories, make a date with each episode featuring a personality from the world of gastronomy. On the menu: discoveries, sharing, and an explosion of flavours!

programme.title: Slam
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Magazine
programme.desc: TV5MONDE, the global French language network, offers the best television programmes from France, Belgium, Switzerland and Canada.

programme.title: C'est Du Belge
programme.desc: In the company of Gerald Watelet, focus on the best ambassadors of Belgian culture and heritage, on the behind-the-scenes of unmissable events and portraits of personalities making the news.

programme.title: L'afrik En Contes - EP 15
programme.desc: A dog lived in a forest with her master who had been accused of sorcery and chased out of the village. Her master being a good man, the dog decided to go and see the genie to ask him to turn her into a woman.

programme.title: La Petite Pokou - EP 4
programme.desc: The Komian finds Pokou and N'zi. She hurls a fireball towards the children but someone responds with an even more powerful ball of light.

programme.title: Il Etait Une Fois... Ces Droles D'objets - EP 17
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: Les Nouvelles Aventures De Kaeloo - EP 34
programme.desc: In Super-Cute-Land, Kaeloo, Stumpy, Quack-Quack and Mr. Cat play a new game every day. And for that they love nothing better than making up their own rules and asking loads of questions about the world around them: with this lot you can never be sure of what will happen next!

programme.title: Oum Le Dauphin Blanc - EP 41
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

programme.title: Oum Le Dauphin Blanc - EP 42
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Temps Present
programme.desc: 'Temps Present'' tackles current events broadly speaking. With its in-depth investigations and critical vision, the programme sheds light on the crises and the conflicts of our time, while denouncing the malfunctions of our society.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Les Tresors Des Abbayes Et Des Cathedrales Francaises
programme.desc: With nearly 90,000 buildings, the oldest of which date back to the fourth century, France's religious heritage is exceptionally rich. Among these monuments, abbeys and cathedrals are the most visited. How were they born and what role did they play?

programme.title: Rassemblance - EP 17
programme.desc: At 17, fleeing the Taliban, Rohullah Hossiny travels through Iran, Turkey, and Greece before arriving in Belgium. In Brussels, thanks to the Duo for a job association, he finds a mentor and joins Corica, where he becomes a master roaster. In turn, he trains other exiles.

programme.title: Echappees Belles
programme.desc: Sophie Jovillard, Jerome Pitorin, Ismael Khelifa and Tiga embark the traveller that lies within each of us for a fabulous breath of fresh air! Ninety minutes filled with new horizons and fascinating encounters around the world, four different ways of seeing a city, a region, a country...

programme.title: DocFilm
programme.desc: 2024 was a record year for Norwegian tourism, with almost 38.6 million overnight stays. The country’s cuisine, culture, and unique destinations entice visitors. But tourism brings its own problems.

programme.title: DW News

programme.title: The Dip
programme.desc: The world spent €106 billion on space in 2023 - more than the GDP of most countries. Critics call it a vanity project. Supporters point to trillion-dollar spinoffs like GPS and satellite navigation that quietly power everything from Uber to global banking. So, who's right? We dig into the numbers and challenge the hype around lunar mining.

programme.title: Movie - Samudhiram
programme.desc: Three brothers would do anything for their only sister. When she is married to the son of a man seeking revenge from their family, the brothers lose all their wealth and are also humiliated by him.

programme.title: Movie - Adithya Varma
programme.desc: Adithya Varma, the wayward son of a businessman, tries to turn over a new leaf after he falls for Meera Shetty. However, caste issues derail their love life and appear to darken Adithya's future.

programme.title: Movie - Naan Chootiya Malar
programme.desc: This movie stars Vijayakanth and Subhadra, and is directed by C S Govindaraja.

programme.title: Movie - Ninaivil Nindraval
programme.desc: A young tourist at a hill station falls in love with her tour guide. When she learns that he was wrongly implicated in a murder case, she tries to help him prove his innocence.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Charlie Chaplin 2
programme.desc: A young man jeopardises his marital life after messaging his wife while under the influence of alcohol. On realising his mistake, he struggles to make amends for it.

programme.title: Movie - 96
programme.desc: K Ramachandran, a photographer, gets nostalgic after he visits his school in his hometown. During a reunion with his classmates, he meets Janaki, his childhood sweetheart.

programme.title: Movie - Aaru
programme.desc: A thug, with his partners, is chosen to work for a criminal gang, and he becomes the left-hand man of the leader. The leader declares a war against another criminal and the thug has to protect him despite losing his friends.

programme.title: Movie - Rambo
programme.desc: Gowtham, a ruthless heir to an education empire and Ram, a kind-hearted orphanage caretaker, are raised with opposing beliefs. When Malar exposes Gowtham's dark secret, the two men face off in a brutal test of power and fists.

programme.title: Movie - Doctor
programme.desc: On the hunt for his fiancee's missing niece Chinnu, military doctor Varun stumbles upon Terry's child abduction and trafficking ring. While in a bid to save Chinnu, her family and Varun end up getting embroiled in Terry's deadly crime web.

programme.title: Movie - Captain Miller
programme.desc: A renegade Captain and his unconventional outlaws execute daring heists in the 1930s and 1940s. Miller must decide whether to continue running or confront the challenges head-on.

programme.title: Movie - Saathikku Oru Neethi
programme.desc: Saathikku Oru Neethi is a 1981 Tamil-language action drama film, directed by S. A. Chandrasekhar, starring Vijayakanth and Swapna in lead roles. Musical score by Sankar Ganesh.

programme.title: Movie - Saranam Ayyappa
programme.desc: Adaikalam, who has been imprisoned for many years, helps two other men to escape from jail. They decide to mingle with the devotees travelling to Sabarimala in order to trick the police.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Ethirum Puthirum
programme.desc: An honest district collector is accused of being linked with a terrorist organisation when he rebels against the police who have been trying to nab Arasappan, terrorist Veeraiyan's brother.

programme.title: Movie - Veerasaamy
programme.desc: Veerasamy, a lawyer and MLA, is a saviour of the oppressed and the biggest roadblock in the criminal activities of the local Health Minister and his wife who together run several illegal businesses.

programme.title: Movie - Amman Koil Kizakkale
programme.desc: Kanmani, a wealthy girl, decides to teach Chinnamani a lesson by pretending to be in love with him. Things, however, take an ugly turn when Chinnamani marries her in a fit of rage.

programme.title: Movie - Samasthanam
programme.desc: Thiru and Surya are friends whose relationship has survived many hurdles. But their bond is broken when a rift is caused due to their respective wives.

programme.title: Movie - Panakkaran
programme.desc: The illegitimate son of a rich man and a singer is raised by a poor drunkard. Before he can commit to the girl he loves, he wants to find out who his biological parents are.

programme.title: Liverpool vs Fulham (MW32) - EP 315

programme.title: PL Moments 2025/26 - EP 8
programme.desc: With over 300 appearances for Arsenal, Martin Keown is an iconic figure at the North London club. A member of the Invincibles, Keown was a graduate of the Arsenal academy before moving to Aston Villa and then Everton before returning to Highbury. A three-time Premier League champion, Keown sits down with PL Moments to talk us through his remarkable journey and select his top ten moments from throughout his time in the Premier League.

programme.title: Manchester United vs Leeds United (MW32) (Live) - EP 320
programme.desc: Manchester United are unbeaten in their last 18 home league games against Leeds (W11 D7) since a 1-0 loss in February 1981 under Dave Sexton.

programme.desc: Fulham have won just two of their 32 away league games against Liverpool (D8 L22), winning 1-0 in both May 2012 and March 2021.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Andrew Van Zyl vs. Champion Dalcha
programme.desc: This episode features main event Andrew 'One Gear' Van Zyl vs. Champion Dalcha for the heavyweight title. From EFC71 in Carnival City, Johannesburg, South Africa on 23-June-2018.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Andre Ward vs. Chad Dawson
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features light heavyweights Andre 'S.O.G.' Ward (25-0, 13 KOs) vs. Chad Dawson (31-1, 17 KOs) in a championship contest from the Oracle Arena in Oakland, California, USA, on September 8, 2012. A paid attendance of 7,611 brought in a gate of $706,469 and 1.

programme.title: XMA
programme.desc: In this episode, we learn about how the use of motion animation technology can help martial artists learn more efficient ways to put extra power behind their punches and kicks.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Dmitry Priog vs. Daniel Jacobs
programme.desc: This episode features a middleweight battle between Dmitry Priog and Daniel Jacobs that ends in a crushing overhand right, as well as kickboxing, sumo, weapons and more!

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Shane Mosley vs. Ricardo Mayorga
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is "Sugar" Shane Mosley facing Ricardo Mayorga in a light middleweight title fight, the first of two bouts between the two, that features an exciting last-minute finish. Also on the card, action from former champs Juan Manuel Marquez and Juan Diaz.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 3 featuring Kotoyuki, Asanoyama, Aoiyama and Ryuden from the Kyushu basho, 2019.

programme.title: Macho: The Hector Camacho Story
programme.desc: This series takes a hard-hitting look at the rise, fall and untimely death of one of boxing's most colorful champions. Hector Camacho's dynamic speed, footwork and power made him a fighter to be reckoned with, but it was his flamboyance and showmanship that ushered in a new era in boxing. The series chronicles his epic battles inside the ring, his struggles with addiction outside of it and the mystery of the double homicide that claimed his life.

programme.title: Tuesday Night Fights Hector Camacho vs. Rusty Derouen
programme.desc: FIGHT SPORTS revisits some of Hector Camacho's best fights from the legendary USA's Tuesday Night Fights series alongside our new documentary series Macho: The Hector Camacho Story. In this episode Hector 'Macho' Camacho (46-3-0, 20 KO) battles Rusty Derouen (33-6-0, 25 KO) in a 10-round Halbmittel contest from Erie, Pennsylvania, USA.

This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 3 featuring Kotoyuki, Asanoyama, Aoiyama and Ryuden from the Kyushu basho, 2019.

programme.title: Macho: The Hector Camacho Story
programme.desc: This series takes a hard-hitting look at the rise, fall and untimely death of one of boxing's most colorful champions. Hector Camacho's dynamic speed, footwork and power made him a fighter to be reckoned with, but it was his flamboyance and showmanship that ushered in a new era in boxing. The series chronicles his epic battles inside the ring, his struggles with addiction outside of it and the mystery of the double homicide that claimed his life.

programme.title: Tuesday Night Fights Hector Camacho vs. Rusty Derouen
programme.desc: FIGHT SPORTS revisits some of Hector Camacho's best fights from the legendary USA's Tuesday Night Fights series alongside our new documentary series Macho: The Hector Camacho Story. In this episode Hector 'Macho' Camacho (46-3-0, 20 KO) battles Rusty Derouen (33-6-0, 25 KO) in a 10-round Halbmittel contest from Erie, Pennsylvania, USA.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Andrew Van Zyl vs. Champion Dalcha
programme.desc: This episode features main event Andrew 'One Gear' Van Zyl vs. Champion Dalcha for the heavyweight title. From EFC71 in Carnival City, Johannesburg, South Africa on 23-June-2018.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Andre Ward vs. Chad Dawson
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features light heavyweights Andre 'S.O.G.' Ward (25-0, 13 KOs) vs. Chad Dawson (31-1, 17 KOs) in a championship contest from the Oracle Arena in Oakland, California, USA, on September 8, 2012. A paid attendance of 7,611 brought in a gate of $706,469 and 1.

programme.title: XMA
programme.desc: In this episode, we learn about how the use of motion animation technology can help martial artists learn more efficient ways to put extra power behind their punches and kicks.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Dmitry Priog vs. Daniel Jacobs
programme.desc: This episode features a middleweight battle between Dmitry Priog and Daniel Jacobs that ends in a crushing overhand right, as well as kickboxing, sumo, weapons and more!

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Shane Mosley vs. Ricardo Mayorga
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is "Sugar" Shane Mosley facing Ricardo Mayorga in a light middleweight title fight, the first of two bouts between the two, that features an exciting last-minute finish. Also on the card, action from former champs Juan Manuel Marquez and Juan Diaz.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 81
programme.desc: Tinky Winky and Dipsy both want a go with Tinky Winky's bag and start to squabble. The Noo-­‐noo sucks up the bag and only gives it back when Tinky Winky and Dipsy are ready to share.

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S3) - EP 15
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'egg' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see lots of eggs - a dippy egg, a fried egg, a gold egg and Dee and a friend even dress up as eggs.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 5
programme.desc: Farmer Fuddle's chickens have escaped. Their feathers make Vivienne Volcano very itchy, so Messy has to find a way to scratch her itches and round up the chickens

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 21
programme.desc: It's pumpkin-picking day at Jackson's farm, but something spooky has been scaring all the pumpkin pickers. Mojo and Bo need to find out what's going on, and chase some ghosts!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 39
programme.desc: Dad thinks he needs to do some exercise, but Bingo pretends to be Boss Bluey's new employee in the middle of Dad's backyard workout.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 38
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo build a very special cubby for their stuffed toy Kimjim.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 6
programme.desc: Why do my feet hurt?', Tag asks Duggee. While Duggee has a think, he tells them 'why' is a great question, and the Squirrels are quick to follow up.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 5
programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. When he comes inside, he explains that he was miming.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 12
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 17
programme.desc: Ubercorn and Glitch head to the Svalbard Global Seed Vault. But, just like when they were cadets together, the two of them get into trouble.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 37
programme.desc: Princesses, horses and magic wands. Bluey and Chloe can play any role they want, when they embark on an adventure to save their playground kingdom from the Greedy Queen.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 40
programme.desc: When Chloe tries to teach her dad to improvise and play Bluey's game of Octopus at home, he finds it hard to understand or enjoy, until they both realize they can play it their own way.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 4
programme.desc: Bingo is helping Mum make an omelette for Dad's birthday breakfast, but cracking eggs is harder than it looks, and Dad is getting hungrier by the minute.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 5
programme.desc: Dad pretends he was born yesterday. Bluey and Bingo have to guide him through his second day on Earth, especially when he discovers food is delicious and steals Lucky's Dad's pie.

programme.title: Andy's Aquatic Adventures (S1) - EP 25
programme.desc: Andy jets off in his safari-mobile to the river Nile in search of some African elephants.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie have fun looking for peas with the Playtimers in their Pea Party game.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 13
programme.desc: When a dancing bug lands on Duggee's head, he can't stop dancing. The Squirrels see that it's a tiny hillbilly bug with a fiddle. And what's more, he's got a band with him - the Hillbilly Bug Band.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 12
programme.desc: A box full of bits and pieces is delivered to the Clubhouse and the Squirrels are excited. Duggee and the Squirrels are going to have to work hard to put it all together. Time for a bit of teamwork.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 11
programme.desc: Duggee is having a lovely cup of tea in his favourite cup when Roly surprises him with a very loud peek-a-boo! It is so loud that Duggee jumps and drops his cup which shatters into pieces.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 23
programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch tries to rescue a Grimbot from an Atlantic hurricane. The Go Jetters have to rescue him!

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 22
programme.desc: Greener fuel spells trouble for Glitch.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S23) - EP 8
programme.desc: While working on the Brazilian Railway, Thomas and Gabriela get ready for the Batucada carnival at the docks.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2) - EP 8
programme.desc: Scarf Lady has misplaced Bag in the Big Shop, so Sarah and Duck help with the search.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2) - EP 12
programme.desc: John has a problem with the origami flamingos he has made and needs Sarah and Duck's help.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 25
programme.desc: Stanley helps Hattie, Fred, and Fifi with a new food delivery service. It starts well, except with each delivery a problem arises. Stanley must solve them before Myrtle's party.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 24
programme.desc: Stan helps his friends to get a closer look at the moon through a telescope, so they can do a show-and-tell.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals (S1) - EP 9
programme.desc: From broccoli soup to cheeseburgers and blue cheese, the funny animals chat about the best and worst things to eat.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S3) - EP 43
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran meet Henry and Bonnie, who are celebrating Lunar New Year. They join them inside the art gallery to find out about Chinese traditions.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 34
programme.desc: Mackenzie, Jack and Rusty are playing as astronauts on a mission to Mars, but during their journey, Mackenzie keeps going missing and no one knows why, not even Mackenzie.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 35
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want Dad all to themselves and will not let Mum have a smoochy kiss. They try to hide him all around the house, but Mum is desperate to spend a little romance time with her husband.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 36
programme.desc: Judo desperately wants to play in the dirt with Bluey and Bingo, but she is not supposed to get herself dirty.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 40
programme.desc: King Tiger has met his perfect partner and he is getting married. It's going to be a royal wedding!! The squirrels are to be special Guests of Honour, but who is King Tiger marrying!?

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 39
programme.desc: When the squirrels upset the mole by being noisy, Duggee suggests some team building.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: King Tiger and the Jelly wonder what Duggee has planned for today. Tag wants a snack, Enid has a musical cheese chase, and Norrie has a haircut.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 2
programme.desc: Glitch and the Grimbots create some enormous blockages after flushing wet wipes.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S2) - EP 3
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the marvellous Cabbage.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S2) - EP 2
programme.desc: Gooseberry sings a song about everything you have to do to become a Gooseberry Club member

programme.title: Supertato (S1) - EP 38

programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their holiday hotel room than relax on the beach.

For the COTD segment, Cakey and Parrot show us how to make adorable safari snacks.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 32
programme.desc: Baby Box is learning to be a great magician and wants to pull a rabbit out of a hat. But when there's no rabbit to be found, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box visit the other Gabby Cats for help. For the COTD, Baby Box, Gabby and Pandy sing the "Whoopsies!" Song.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 33
programme.desc: It’s Easter-time in the dollhouse! When Gabby unboxes an Easter basket with an orange egg inside, all the Gabby Cats want to know what’s inside, but when CatRat accidentally sends it rolling out of Kitty Fairy’s garden, Gabby and Pandy go on a springtime search through the Dollhouse to find it. Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 34
programme.desc: There's a mystery in the dollhouse! When things start to mysteriously disappear around the dollhouse, Gabby and Pandy play detectives, using all their senses to find clues, follow them, and solve the mystery. For our COTD segment, CatRat and Baby Me-Owls show us how to make ice cube paints!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 35
programme.desc: When CatRat gets stuck on planet Caturn, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go save him. DJ Catnip teaches them a song to remember how to get there and Baby Box helps them make jetpacks so they can zip around. In the Cat-osphere, they take a twirl through Space Swirls and zip through the Supergallactic Doughnut Hole and even meet DJ Catnip's cousin, DJ Comet! For the Cat of the Day Segment, Baby Box and DJ Comet show us how to craft a papier-mâché Caturn.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 33
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Ants didn't work together. The Ants desperately wanted to build themselves a home, but all the animals kept sitting on them, or sneezing them far away or swooping them up into tall trees! On the point of giving up, one brave, young soldier ant rallies the troops… "Pamoja! Together! Together they can do anything!!!"… and he was right. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 34
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Flea didn't jump. Flea didn't really move at all. She was very big and very round. All Flea wanted to do was to see the world. The Tinga Tinga animals try to help lift Flea high up, but she is too heavy. Then Tortoise comes up with an idea ‘Movement and activity!' and after many attempts Flea discovers that she can jump. She can jump really high! Then Flea can jump everywhere and see everything.! Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 15

Falling timber, an out of control sofa, Bonnie the dog, high winds...! Pat's journey from the sorting office to Pencaster Bay is a minefield of hazards. Waiting for the bulb is lighthouse keeper Chris Beacon and his pet parrot Micawber, both anxious to get the lighthouse working before sundown, and tracking a storm blowing in.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 16
programme.desc: The Thompson's family pigeon, Cedric, has been reported found in Northern Ireland. Pat must take Dorothy and Bill to help bring him back in the SDS Plane. Meanwhile Alf camps out at the sorting office, pining for his beloved Cedric's return. Once in Ireland, Pat meets the man who found Cedric and Dorothy manages to charm him down from his roof. Unfortunately an inopportune phone call from Alf startles cedric and causes him to take up a roost on a cliff face with a friendly puffin.
